sections.title: 一、根据朗读，判断下列句子中单词画线部分的发音是“T”否“F”相同
sections.instruction: 判断下列句子中画线部分的发音是“T”否“F”相同。

questions.prompt: Let's <u>g</u>o to the zoo and see the <u>g</u>iraffes.
questions.translation: 我们去动物园看长颈鹿吧。
questions.explanation: 测试字母 g 在 go 和 giraffes 中的发音。go 中的 g 发 /ɡ/，而 giraffes 中的 g 发 /dʒ/，发音不同。

questions.prompt: Sam has m<u>ea</u>t for br<u>ea</u>kfast.
questions.explanation: 测试字母组合 ea 在 meat 和 breakfast 中的发音。meat 中的 ea 发长元音 /iː/，而 breakfast 中的 ea 发短元音 /e/，发音不同。

questions.prompt: Let's g<u>o</u> and visit our <u>o</u>ld friends this Sunday.
questions.translation: 这个星期天我们去拜访我们的老朋友吧。
questions.explanation: 测试字母 o 在 go 和 old 中的发音。两者中的 o 均发双元音 /əʊ/，发音相同。

questions.prompt: My mum l<u>i</u>kes wr<u>i</u>ting.
questions.explanation: 测试字母 i 在 likes 和 writing 中的发音。两者中的 i 均发双元音 /aɪ/，发音相同。

questions.prompt: The pand<u>a</u>s are very f<u>a</u>t.
questions.explanation: 测试字母 a 在 pandas（第一个a）和 fat 中的发音。两者中的 a 均发梅花音 /æ/，发音相同。

sections.title: 二、请根据图片选择合适的单词填空
sections.instruction: 根据图片选择合适的单词，将其填在横线上。

questions.prompt: I can see a ______ at the zoo.
questions.translation: 我能在动物园里看到一只长颈鹿。
questions.explanation: giraffe 意为“长颈鹿”，符合动物园看到的动物的情境。

questions.prompt: He has got a long ______.
questions.explanation: 根据长（long）这一描述，在备选词中 nose（鼻子）最符合句意。

questions.prompt: The ______ are sweet.
questions.explanation: are 提示主语是复数，strawberries（草莓）是复数名词且是甜的水果，符合句意。

questions.prompt: It's ______ past five. It's time to go home.
questions.translation: 现在是五点半。该回家了。
questions.explanation: half past five 是固定表达，意为“五点半”。

questions.prompt: We have ______ on Friday.
questions.explanation: maths 意为“数学课”，与 have 搭配表示上课。

sections.title: 三、根据上下文选择合适的单词补全短文
sections.instruction: 阅读短文，选择合适的单词填空。
sections.passage: This is a [1] of my family. This is my mum. She [2] reading. This is my father. He likes [3] photos. This is my brother. He likes swimming. He has got big [4]. I like animals. I have got a dog. It's cute. It [5] got four short feet.

questions.translation: 这是一张我全家的照片。
questions.explanation: 前面有不定冠词 a 修饰，此处应用单数形式 photo。
主语 She 是第三人称单数，一般现在时中动词要用单三形式 likes。
like doing sth 是固定搭配，表示喜欢做某事，这里用 taking。
人有两只眼睛，通常用复数 eyes。
主语 It 是第三人称单数，表示“有”用 has got 结构。

sections.title: 四、根据要求选择句子或回答问题
sections.instruction: 根据要求选择句子或回答问题。

questions.prompt: 选出匹配描述“这台机器人有两只大眼睛和两条短腿”的英文句子：
options: This robot has got two big eyes and two short legs.
This robot has got two small eyes and two long legs.
This robot has got two big ears and two short arms.
questions.explanation: 大眼睛（big eyes）和短腿（short legs），符合题意的是选项A。

questions.prompt: 选出能表达对话“——它们是什么？——它们是老虎鞋。”的英文句子：
questions.explanation: “它们是什么”用 What are they，“老虎鞋”用 tiger shoes，符合的选项是A。

questions.prompt: What does Lingling do on Sunday?
questions.explanation: 星期天一般不上课，而是去拜访老朋友（She visits her old friends），故选A。

questions.prompt: It's 9 pm. What does Yuanyuan do? (提示：睡觉)
questions.translation: 现在是晚上九点。圆圆做什么？
questions.explanation: 根据常识，晚上九点是上床睡觉的时间，可答 She goes to bed.

questions.prompt: What do you like doing? (根据自身实际情况回答)
questions.explanation: 根据自身实际情况回答即可，例如：I like reading books.

sections.title: 五、读对话，选择合适的选项补全对话
sections.instruction: 下面是 Lingling 和妈妈的一段对话，请根据情境补全对话内容。

dialogue.speaker: Mum
dialogue.text: Lingling, it's time to get up.

dialogue.speaker: Mum
dialogue.text: What do you like for breakfast?

dialogue.speaker: Mum
dialogue.text: Here are your eggs and milk.

options: What classes do you have today?

questions.explanation: 前句提问“What time is it?”（几点了？），后句答语应为时间，故选 It's half past seven。
前句提问“早餐喜欢吃什么？”，后文妈妈回应“Here are your eggs and milk.”，所以应该选择 I like eggs and milk。
前文提问“你喜欢什么水果？”，选项中 bananas 为水果，故选 I like bananas。

questions.answer: What classes do you have today?
questions.explanation: 后文玲玲回答“我今天有美术和英语课”，可见问句是询问当天的课程，故选 What classes do you have today?
前句提问“你喜欢英语吗？”，是一般疑问句，用“Yes, I do.”作肯定回答。

sections.title: 六、阅读课程表，判断正误
sections.instruction: 这是 Lingling 一天的课程安排，根据表格内容，判断正（T）误（F）。
sections.passage:
| Time | Monday | Tuesday | Wednesday | Thursday | Friday |
| --- | --- | --- | --- | --- | --- |
| 8:20~8:55 | English | Reading | Maths | Writing | Chinese |
| 9:10~9:45 | Chinese | Art | Chinese | Chinese | English |
| 9:45~10:20 | Exercise |
| 10:20~10:55 | Maths | Chinese | Science | Maths | Music |
| 10:55~11:30 | Have lunch |
| 11:30~13:30 | Noon break |
| 13:30~14:05 | Music | PE | PE | English | Maths |
| 14:20~14:55 | PE | IT | Reading | PE | Art |

questions.prompt: Lingling can go to school at 8:30.
questions.explanation: 根据表格，周一到周五的第一节课都是在 8:20 开始，8:30 去学校会上课迟到，所以该说法错误。

questions.prompt: On Monday, Lingling has Music at 13:30.
questions.translation: 星期一，玲玲在13:30上音乐课。
questions.explanation: 查看表格周一（Monday）的 13:30~14:05 栏，确为 Music（音乐课），该表述正确。

questions.prompt: Lingling has Chinese every day.
questions.explanation: 周一至周五的课表上每天都排有 Chinese，即每天都有语文课，该表述正确。

questions.prompt: Lingling has a rest(休息) at noon for 1.5 hours.
questions.translation: 玲玲中午可以休息1.5小时。
questions.explanation: Noon break（午休时间）为 11:30~13:30，共2个小时，而非1.5小时，故表述错误。

questions.prompt: Lingling can do some exercise at 10 o'clock.
questions.translation: 玲玲可以在10点做一些锻炼。
questions.explanation: 周三的 9:45~10:20 是 Exercise，所以在10点钟她可以做锻炼，该表述正确。

sections.title: 七、阅读短文完成下列任务
sections.instruction: Lingling 向我们介绍了自己的饮食习惯，请认真阅读并完成下列各题。
sections.passage:
I love eating yummy food. For breakfast, I have milk, bread and apples. They are healthy(健康的).
For lunch, I like noodles and vegetables. I also love fruit. I like grapes and bananas.
Fish and chicken are my favourite food for dinner. I eat some oranges, too. They're rich in vitamins(维生素).
And for snacks(点心) between the meals, I enjoy a sandwich or a hot dog! I like different kinds of food. They taste good and give me energy(能量) all day!

questions.prompt: The writer does NOT have ______ for snacks.
questions.explanation: 文中提到点心吃 sandwich（三明治）或 hot dog（热狗），没有提到苹果（苹果是早餐吃的），故选C。

questions.prompt: What can we know from the passage?
options: The writer has got a good eating habit.
The writer has got a bad eating habit.
questions.translation: 从文章中我们可以知道什么？
questions.explanation: 作者饮食多样化、注重营养（healthy），可以说有好的饮食习惯，故选A。
